case_results.description: Account balance updates after multiple linked transactions.
A categorized transaction updates category spending and budget balance.
A transaction updates monthly report totals and net worth.
Multiple expenses accumulate correctly in account, budget, and report.
Monthly budget and report only count transactions from the selected month.
Account balance, category spending, budget balance, and report totals agree for one expense.
Editing a transaction refreshes account balance, budget values, and report values.
A failed transaction without account does not change existing state.

case_results.description: A transaction with both payment and deposit greater than zero fails without changing state.

case_results.description: A rule created before a matching transaction automatically categorizes it when rules are applied.
A rule created after an existing transaction can update that transaction when rules are applied.
A schedule generates a real transaction that updates account balance and report values.
A schedule-generated transaction can be categorized by a rule and then update budget and report values.
Renaming a category preserves related transactions, budgets, and report consistency.
